title: Messi scripts history with first World Cup hat-trick, equals Klose's goals record

A world champion, two-time Copa América winner and holder of multiple World Cup records, Messi’s latest landmark further underlines his extraordinary longevity and enduring importance to Argentina as they begin their title defence.

SpaceX soars past Amazon in market value after IPO frenzy; options trading begins
description: SpaceX shares soared over 14% Tuesday, briefly surpassing Amazon and nearing Microsoft's valuation, reaching $2.85 trillion. Investor excitement surged with new options trading, despite analysts warning of extreme volatility and questioning the lofty valuation. The company also plans a $60 billion acquisition.

Meet Pawan Kumar Chandana: Ex-Isro scientist who now owns India’s largest rocket factory
description: From scoring 51 in Maths to founding India's largest private rocket factory, Pawan Kumar Chandana's journey is inspiring. After a stint at ISRO, he co-founded Skyroot Aerospace, launching India's first privately built rocket. Now valued at $1.1 billion, the company is set to achieve orbital launches, placing India among global space leaders.

How Qatar, not Pakistan, became the real power broker in US-Iran deal
description: While Pakistan sought the spotlight in its diplomatic endeavours, it was Qatar’s subtle, low-key mediation that ultimately held the key to the US-Iran ceasefire. Leveraging its unique relationship with Tehran and access to the American administration, Qatar's patient and discreet shuttle diplomacy triumphed over more boisterous efforts that were ridiculed globally.

AIMIM's alliance politics: Owaisi sets stage to do a Bihar in UP assembly polls
description: Asaduddin Owaisi's AIMIM is employing a familiar strategy in Uttar Pradesh, mirroring its Bihar and Maharashtra campaigns. By offering alliances to opposition parties while simultaneously challenging them directly, Owaisi aims to pressure rivals and appeal to Muslim voters. This tactic places parties like the Samajwadi Party in a difficult position, potentially splitting secular votes and aiding the BJP.

title: 'Collapsing tunnels, booby-trapping entrances': How Iran is shielding its uranium stockpile
Dell CEO Michael Dell makes one of largest public university donations in US history
description: Michael Dell has gifted a staggering $750 million to the University of Texas at Austin, propelling the creation of a groundbreaking AI-native hospital and research campus. This substantial donation, adding to his family's legacy of support, will also bolster scholarships, advanced computing, and vital medical research, underscoring Dell's enduring connection to his alma mater.

title: Who pays for repairs in a rented home? What tenants and landlords need to know
description: India's Model Tenancy Act, 2021 clarifies landlord and tenant responsibilities for property upkeep. Landlords are accountable for major repairs, with tenants able to deduct costs from rent if obligations are unmet. Tenants must prevent damage and report issues promptly, facing deductions from their security deposit for failures.

title: US senator says Tesla benefited from govt support, Elon Musk replies
description: Elon Musk has refuted claims that his companies, Tesla and SpaceX, owe their success to government aid, stating such incentives represent less than 2% of their value. The debate ignited between Senators Mike Lee and Ed Markey over taxpayer contributions to Musk's wealth. Musk asserted that removing EV tax credits actually boosted Tesla's market share.
